Alteran AI routing index

Primary repository-level AI routing:
- AGENTS.md

Canonical source of truth:
- docs/spec/001-alteran_spec.md
- docs/spec/006-alteran_best_practice_rules_spec.md
- docs/spec/007-alteran-ai-docs-spec.md
- docs/adr/
- docs/user/
- docs/dev/
- docs/reference/

Operational overlays:
- .github/copilot-instructions.md
- docs/ai-dev/README.md
- docs/ai-dev/agents/README.md
- docs/ai-dev/agents/alteran-expert.md
- docs/ai-dev/agents/alteran-reviewer.md
- docs/ai-dev/repository-rules.md
- docs/ai-dev/skills/spec-and-doc-sync.md
- docs/ai-dev/skills/bootstrap-and-generated-surfaces.md
- docs/ai-dev/skills/managed-execution-and-context.md
- docs/ai-dev/skills/command-surface-and-terminology.md
- docs/ai-user/AGENTS.md
- docs/ai-user/llms.txt
- docs/ai-user/README.md
- docs/ai-user/agents/README.md
- docs/ai-user/agents/alteran-expert.md
- docs/ai-user/rules/core-rules.md
- docs/ai-user/skills/bootstrap-and-entry.md
- docs/ai-user/skills/apps-tools-and-libs.md
- docs/ai-user/skills/managed-execution-and-logging.md

Key repository rules:
- Keep normative architecture in docs/spec/, not in AI overlays.
- Keep setup as the only live bootstrap command surface; do not revive init.
- Keep setup separate from generated local activate.
- Treat src/ as authored source and .runtime/ as generated local state.
- Keep project context and canonical logs project-scoped.
- Use archive sources for installation/materialization and run sources for execution bootstrap.
- Use docs/ai-dev/repository-rules.md as the hard maintainer summary before high-leverage edits.

Change policy:
- Update docs/spec/ first when public behavior, layout, naming, config, testing, or publication contracts change.
- Update docs/adr/ when the change is architectural.
- Update docs/user/, docs/dev/, and docs/reference/ next.
- Update AGENTS.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, repository llms.txt, and docs/ai-dev/ last.
